## Summary

- Explain the user-facing or system-level change.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Risk Review

- [ ] I touched planning / strategy logic and described the invariant changes below.
- [ ] I changed routes or persistence behavior and checked backward compatibility.
- [ ] I verified any new workflow assumptions against existing tests or added coverage.

## Invariants / Notes

- Document any planner, goal-state, or execution-spine assumptions changed by this PR.
